question: Does the output contain exactly 6 generated images consisting of: 1 hero image, 3 distinct lifestyle images (commuting, weekend, travel), 1 material comparison image, and 1 size specification diagram?
Does the output include accompanying marketing copy that covers product details, selling points, and usage scenarios?
Does the marketing copy explicitly highlight unique selling points of 'vegetable-tanned leather' (e.g., patina development, natural grain/texture) rather than generic leather characteristics?
Does the text include specific practical information such as dimensions, handmade craftsmanship details, and care instructions?
Does the hero image focus on the tote bag with professional lighting and an authentic vegetable-tanned leather appearance (e.g., visible grain, warm tones)?
Do the three lifestyle images clearly depict the specific requested scenarios: Commuting (office/transit), Weekend (leisure/casual), and Travel (luggage/transport)?
Does the material comparison image visually demonstrate a clear difference or detail (e.g., close-up side-by-side) to highlight craftsmanship or material quality?
Does the size specification diagram include clear visual indicators (lines/arrows) and legible numerical labels for the bag's dimensions?
Are all generated images free from obvious AI artifacts (e.g., distorted hands, impossible geometry, garbled text in diagrams) and of sufficient quality for e-commerce?
Do all images consistently depict the same bag design (color, shape, handles, and hardware) across the hero, lifestyle, and technical shots?
Do the images maintain a cohesive visual style (lighting, color grading, aesthetic) suitable for a single brand campaign?
Does the text adjacent to each lifestyle image accurately describe the specific scenario (commuting, weekend, travel) depicted in that image?
Do the dimensions or specifications mentioned in the text match the values shown in the size specification diagram?
Does the material comparison image provide informative visual details that substantiate the text's claims about quality or craftsmanship?
Are the lifestyle, comparison, and size images placed immediately adjacent to the relevant text sections discussing those specific topics?
